raw_response_text:
<features>
- Large, symmetrically arranged broad petals with a vertical pink/magenta central stripe bordered by pale white/light pink petal edges
- Prominent clustered stamens with dark reddish-pink outer structures and a lighter yellowish central disc
- Multiple overlapping/arranged petals around the flower center
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has broad petals with a central colored stripe on pale petal backgrounds, plus a dark-centered stamen cluster] THEN [class 81]
- IF [flower has narrow, curved yellow petals atop a tall green stem] THEN [class 14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image perfectly matches the rules for class 81: it has broad petals with pink central stripes, pale petal borders, and the characteristic dark and yellow central stamen cluster, identical visually to the first two example images labeled as 81. It does not match the yellow, narrow-petaled structure of the class 14 examples.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- Bright yellow flower with curved, textured petals
- Long, narrow green iris-like leaves surrounding the bloom
- Distinct larger lower petals and smaller upper petals typical of iris flowers
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower is bright yellow with curved petals and surrounded by long green sword-shaped leaves] THEN [class 14]
- IF [flower has pink/white striped petals with a dark central stamen cluster] THEN [class 81]
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the first IF-THEN rule: it has bright yellow curved petals, surrounded by long green iris-style leaves, matching the visual patterns of the class 14 examples provided previously.
</rule_check>

<response>14</response>
